title: stelis gastrodes
intro: Stelis gastrodes, also known as the Yellow-stemmed Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Stelis gastrodes include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
